visual-anti-patterns.notes: One anti-pattern: sidebar category labels and landing-page card descriptions appear smaller than 16px; no gradient orbs, no purple-to-blue backgrounds, no nested cards, no cluttered dashboards.

visual-child-friendly.notes: Emoji-based object palette, friendly AI buddy Sparky with suggestion pills, big tappable toolbar buttons, minimal text density, warm calm color palette throughout.

visual-consistency.notes: Consistent warm beige backgrounds, coral accent color, rounded corners, and typography across landing/builder/gallery; minor drift in gallery Play/Edit button color treatment versus landing buttons.

visual-accessibility.notes: Good text-on-background contrast throughout and clear text labels on toolbar and palette icons; no visible focus rings and no evidence of narrow-width responsive behavior.
